summary: AmbyoAI v2 backend fully tested end-to-end. 28/28 pytest cases passed covering root health, patient OTP two-step flow (pending→registered), doctor email/password auth, role enforcement (403 matrix), consent validation (all-true requirement + cross-patient 403), full session workflow (create→results→complete), patient/doctor view divergence (medical_findings hidden for patient / exposed for doctor), doctor dashboard (stats/list/risk-filter/search/detail), diagnosis save with reviewed=true persistence, and the clinical classifier producing correct severity-graded medical_findings for urgent (leukocoria + gaze>20Δ + hirschberg>4mm + VA 6/60) vs. normal (all in-range) fixtures.
critical_code_review_comments: classify_risk: 'moderate' severity on Hirschberg>2mm sets high=True, producing risk_level='moderate' — mapping is consistent but label 'moderate' comes from the high bucket, not a dedicated severity. Minor naming confusion only; behaviour correct.
/auth/me returns only keys present in token — fine, but email/hospital_id are missing for patient tokens (expected; document if FE expects them).

POST /patient/register does NOT check for existing patient with same phone — a patient_pending token used twice could create duplicate patient rows. Recommend upsert on phone or 409 if record already exists.
make_token uses datetime.utcnow-equivalent via now(timezone.utc); fine. JWT_SECRET default is shipped in code — ensure prod overrides via env.
server.py is 549 lines — still within the 700-line guideline but approaching the split threshold; consider modular routers (auth/patient/doctor) for future maintainability.
Mongo _id is correctly excluded via projection {"_id": 0} across all reads — good.
test_credentials: Doctor doctor@aravind.in / aravind2026, Patient OTP=1234 for any 10-digit phone
seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_-prefixed patients (TEST_Patient, TEST_Flow, TEST_Other, TEST_Intruder, TEST_Normal) and one reviewed urgent session with diagnosis. No cleanup performed — these act as demo fixtures for the doctor dashboard.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v2 backend is green (28/28). Reusable pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_ambyoai_v2_backend.py — uses unique 10-digit phones per run (time-based) so idempotent. Frontend untested per this iteration's scope; next agent should cover UI flows: patient OTP screen → registration → 4-toggle consent → 6 tests → simple report, and doctor login → dashboard → patient drilldown → medical report + diagnosis form + PDF downloads.
